title: FAO Irish Evangelion Fans
wikitext:
[]: FAO Irish Evangelion Fans.             Quote Post by Dartz » Fri Jan 27, 2012 6:54 pm All four of them Nom-Con's guests have been announced Tiffany Grant and Matt Greenfield will be guests at this year's Nom-Con, at the end of August. With any luck, I'll get another signature on my platinum set.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Jan 28, 2012 12:29 pm This is of interest to me also. I can get the ferry or fly from liverpool to dublin.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon Jan 30, 2012 9:08 pm Ferry >> Flying. And be sure to pre-reg or book early if you're coming. Though, it isn't like UK cons.... even though there're some of the same traders, events, guests etc.... the difference is, we're Irish.

Article: FAO Irish Evangelion Fans

With any luck, I'll get another signature on my platinum set.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Jan 28, 2012 12:29 pm This is of interest to me also. I can get the ferry or fly from liverpool to dublin.
